findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 43. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Repeated header content from blank PDF page 2 letterhead is rendered inline in the HTML, causing official names and titles (PAT McCRORY Governor, DONALD R. VAN DER VAART Secretary, TRACY DAVIS Director) to appear twice in sequence before the MEMORANDUM heading—once in the letterhead header area and again as body text.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows the letterhead with names/titles once at the top, then the MEMORANDUM heading. PDF page 2 is a blank page with only the letterhead repeated. In the HTML, both letterhead renderings appear in the continuous flow: the names appear right-aligned in the header area at the top, then appear again left-aligned as body text immediately before the MEMORANDUM heading, creating duplicated information in the reading path.
